# Transcrição: 14. Gratitude Close

- **Fonte:** 14. Gratitude Close
- **Duração:** 00:30

---

## [00:00 - 00:30]

The gratitude close. Mr. Byer, I agree it's a lot of money. Be grateful that you and your company are in a position to even consider this product. There are businesses that are shutting their door today and people don't even know where they're going to get their next meal from. They'd love to be in your position. You are able to own and enjoy your new whatever it is, okay? You deserve it. You've worked hard for it. You're in a position to do it. Be grateful you can. I need your approval here, here, and here.
